tech_news.title: Moiré engineering of Cooper-pair density modulation states - nature.com
tech_news.description: Researchers created a moiré superlattice in Sb2Te3/FeTe bilayers, producing spatially modulated superconducting gaps directly imaged with Josephson scanning tunnelling microscopy and spectroscopy, tunable by replacing Sb2Te3 with Bi2Te3.
